CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
NATHAN S. ARRINGTON,, Esq., SHEPPARD, MULLIN, RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP 619.338.6500 narrington@sheppardmullin.com Attorneys for Defendants 41 TEHAMA LP, HINES INTERESTS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, AND WILLOWICK MANAGEMENT LLC
No Other Appearances.

Discussion held as to why Barclay R. Nicholson, Esq., counsel seeking to be admitted pro hac vice is not present. Court informs counsel that the party seeking to be admitted Pro Hac Vice is required to be present at the hearing.

DEFENDANT 41 TEHAMA LP, HINES INTERESTS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, WILLOWICK MANAGEMENT LLC MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is taken off calendar. Motion may be re-noticed for hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
